utility_evaluation.REASONING:
There are 5 items in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. All 5 appear in the final coverage plan. Now check full specification with required details:
- health_coverage: Requires physical and mental health insurance with costs. Plan specifies comprehensive physical and mental health insurance, mentions stress-related coverage, identifies family members and start date, and gives cost (€950/month). Fully specified.
- property_coverage: Requires home/contents insurance with costs. Plan lists two policies (VitalPlus Standard and EliteHome Premium), describes included items (golf equipment, business equipment), and provides costs (€60 and €95; total €155/month). Fully specified.
- travel_coverage: Requires travel insurance with costs. Plan provides policy name (PrimeTravel Premium), cost (€45/month), timing (temporary March 10–20, 2025), and features (pre-existing condition coverage, 24/7 assistance). Fully specified.
- additional_services: Requires any enhancement services with costs. Plan lists services (executive lifestyle protection, international coordination, stress management programs, concierge medical services) but does not provide costs. Not fully specified.
- total_budget: Requires complete monthly/annual cost breakdown. Plan provides monthly total, component breakdown, annual total, and comparison to previous spending. Fully specified.
Thus, 4 out of 5 items are fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan mentions: (1) Company Benefits Family Coverage for health – this does not match any specific plan name in the ground-truth, so no direct rating can be mapped. (2) Property coverage lists two explicit products: VitalPlus Standard Coverage and EliteHome Premium Coverage, which both exist under property_protection.home_content. (3) Travel coverage names PrimeTravel Premium with pre-existing condition coverage, which matches mobility_coverage.travel_insurance.PrimeTravel Premium Plan. Additional services are generic and not exact items from the ratings list. Therefore, map the two property items and the travel item.
